zh.Leiderdorp, Leiderdorp, Zuid-Holland, Ne: 荷蘭-拉藍德萊德爾多普
zh.lifeSummary: 當Pieter van Hasebrouck於1607年出生在荷蘭努-布拉班特時，他的父親Jan van Haesbrouck46歲，母親Jannetgen Serwouter45歲。他於1614年3月22日與Loysken Geschierre在荷蘭-拉藍德萊登結婚。他去世於1657年在荷蘭-拉藍德萊德爾多普享年50歲。

zh-hans.Leiderdorp, Leiderdorp, Zuid-Holland, Ne: 荷兰-拉藍德萊德爾多普
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pieter van Hasebrouck于1607年出生在荷兰努-布拉班特时，他的父亲Jan van Haesbrouck46岁，母亲Jannetgen Serwouter45岁。他于1614年3月22日与Loysken Geschierre在荷兰-拉藍德萊登结婚。他去世于1657年在荷兰-拉藍德萊德爾多普享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Hasebrouck
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (mainly Nord): habitational name from a place in French Flanders, spelled Hazebrouck in French, Hazebroek in Flemish, meaning ‘hare fen’. Compare   Hassebroek  .

History: In 1675–78 Huguenots Abraham Hasbrouck and his brother Jean, born between c. 1643 and c. 1650 in France, were among the founders of the town of New Paltz, NY. Both are listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America, while in the similar register of the (US) National Huguenot Society it is their father, Jean Hasbroucq or Hasbrouck, Sr, who is listed.

variants.name: Hassebroek
meanings: Dutch: variant of Flemish Haesebrouck (see Hasbrouck ), or of the Dutch cognate Hazebroek, which could also be a habitational name from any of several farms so named, for example near Wassenaar in the province South Holland.

nameMeanings.name: Pieter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.description: "English navigator Henry Hudson, under contract to the United East India Company, sails from Amsterdam and ""discovers""Manhattan Island and the future site of New York."

Henry Hudson sailed into the river that now bears his name. English explorer Henry Hudson sailed into the river that now bears his name. Hudson sailed for the Dutch East India Company in search of the Northwest Passage, a water route linking the Atlantic and Pacific Oceans, when he sailed up the present-day Hudson River.
Curacao became a colony of the Netherlands.
End of Eighty Years' War with Spain.

en.lifeSummary: When Pieter van Hasebrouck was born in 1607, in North Brabant, Netherlands, his father, Jan van Haesbrouck, was 46 and his mother, Jannetgen Serwouter, was 45. He married Loysken Geschierre on 22 March 1614, in Leiden, South Holland, Netherlands. He died in 1657, in Leiderdorp, South Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pieter van Hasebrouck est né en 1607, à Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas, son père, Jan van Haesbrouck, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Jannetgen Serwouter, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Loysken Geschierre le 22 mars 1614, à Leiden, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas. Il est décédé en 1657, à Leiderdorp, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pieter van Hasebrouck 1607 in Nord-Brabant, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jan van Haesbrouck 46 und seine Mutter Jannetgen Serwouter 45. Er hat am 22. März 1614 in Leiden, Südholland, Niederlande Loysken Geschierre geheiratet. Er starb 1657 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Leiderdorp, Südholland, Niederlande.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pieter van Hasebrouck è nato il nel 1607 nel Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Jan van Haesbrouck, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Jannetgen Serwouter, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Loysken Geschierre il 22 marzo 1614, nel Leiden, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi. Morì nel 1657, nel Leiderdorp, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Pieter van Hasebrouckが1607年にオランダノオルド-ブラバントで生まれた時，父Jan van Haesbrouckは46歳，母Jannetgen Serwouterは45歳であった。1614年3月22日にオランダズイド-hオランドレイデンでLoysken Geschierreと結婚した。彼は1657年にオランダズイド-hオランドレイデルドルプで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Pieter van Hasebrouck(이)가 1607년 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jan van Haesbrouck(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Jannetgen Serwouter(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1614년 3월 22일 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 레이든에서 Loysken Geschierre(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1657년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 레이더도르프에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pieter van Hasebrouck nasceu em 1607, em Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos, seu pai, Jan van Haesbrouck, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Jannetgen Serwouter, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Loysken Geschierre em 22 de março de 1614, em Leiden, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos. Ele faleceu em 1657, em Leiderdorp, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pieter van Hasebrouck родился в 1607 г. в местности нурд-брабант, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Jan van Haesbrouck было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Jannetgen Serwouter, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Loysken Geschierre 22 марта 1614 г. в местности лиден, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды. Он умер в 1657 г. в местности лидирдорп, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 50 лет.

Se casó con Loysken Geschierre el 22 de marzo de 1614, en Leiden, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos. Murió en 1657, en Leiderdorp, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 50 años.
